text.title: Paid Ads Creative Library Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Paid Ads Creative Library. Each pairs symptom + sourced root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Library has 400+ unique tags (singular/plural/typos); search returns 5% of relevant assets.
antipattern.fix: Lock taxonomy to 5 axes with controlled vocab; bulk-retag legacy assets.

antipattern.symptom: Winning variant in Q2 cannot be traced back to baseline; team rebuilds 'from scratch' losing insight.
antipattern.fix: Enforce lineage_parent at upload; backfill known lineage where possible.

antipattern.symptom: Asset running 12 weeks; CTR down 60% from peak; still in rotation; CPA up 80%.
antipattern.fix: Auto-deprecate after 8 weeks OR 30% CTR drop; block from new campaigns.
